data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Family/household add-ons', but the evidence provided does not confirm this requirement. The linked use case mentions various membership features but does not include any details or endpoints that demonstrate the existence of family or household add-ons. This absence indicates a clear gap in the requirement coverage, as the specific need for family/household add-ons is not addressed in the provided evidence.
gaps: No evidence of family/household add-ons in the membership model.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Define family/household add-ons feature
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the system supports family/household add-ons for memberships.
